title: The Thief of Paris
writer: Georges Darien, Jean-Claude Carrière, Louis Malle
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Geneviève Bujold, Marie Dubois
plot: In Paris around 1900, Georges Randal is brought up by his wealthy uncle, who steals his inheritance. Georges hopes to marry his cousin Charlotte, but his uncle arranges for her to marry a rich neighbour. As an act of revenge, Geor...
